thankyou_screens.title:
Thanks for completing this typeform
Now *create your own* — it's free, easy, & beautiful

fields.title:
We’ll ask you about your business, your brand, your target market, this project and, finally, about you. 

Ready?
First,* your business*
Which industry does your business belong to?
Tell us about the main turning points in the history of your business
Who are your main competitors?

properties.description: If they have websites, include their URLs.

fields.title: And to finish this section, what sets your business apart from the competition?
Let's move on to* your brand*
What are you branding?
What's your brand name?
And where can we find your website, if you have one?
Could you share your brand mission?
If your brand were a person, which of the following word groups would best describe them?
And which of the following designs would best suit your brand?
Okay. And which of these colors do you feel best represents your brand?
Last question in this section. If you had to choose one of these fonts for your brand, which would you choose?
Thanks, that was helpful. You're about halfway through.
Let's talk about *your target market*
So, how old is your target demographic?
And what's their average household income over 12 months?
How do they find and learn about your brand?
What type of marketing is most likely to influence a customer's buying decision?
To finish this section, is there something else can you tell us about your customers?
Thanks. Now some questions on* this particular project.*
What's your budget for this project?
And which services are you most interested in?
What are your objectives  for this project?
And do you have a deadline in mind?
We're almost done*.* Just some final questions *about you.*
Let's start with your first name...
And your last name?
What country do you live in?
What's the best* email address* to reach you?
And finally, could we grab your phone number as well?

properties.description: Include your area code. Please exclude symbols and spaces.

fields.title: Thanks! That's all the questions we have. We'll review your answers and contact you as soon as possible.
